review_body_text: Have the opportunity to train the clients in classroom Have the opportunity to have on phone training with the clients I gain knowledge about Regional Cash Management System

review_title: Stable company & good chance for career enhancement
review_body_text: Maybank is a good place to work, it gives me a good chance of career advancement and brings out my potential to excel. It has the best health benefit that any company can offer. It practices humanisation, not only to its customers but also to its staffs. We have a work life balance in Maybank

- The best way to enjoy your work is the environment at your workplace, it between your manager and clique. The best part when u get a supportive team member and boss. Beside that the environment of your surrounding area that help to done you work peacefully.
cons_text: To have sudden direction by management

review_title: environment and culture in working place
review_body_text: The environment and culture in the company has help me to learn many new thing. It also help me to improve my skill and production in order to serve the organization.

Working for 3 years and 7 months as a banker really provide me with a lot of experience. Started my career as BMELP which is a talent management program that I have had passing through for 2 years enable me to adopt a fast learning culture and contributes towards a productive working culture as I was all-rounder for a branch management. After BMELP, I then joined in a more specific sector which is Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) as Business Development Executive (BDE). This role is important because as BDE, I am tasked to meet with customer and offering them financial assistance. This relatively contributes towards the positive growth in Maybank.

review_title: Productive and a good place to work
review_body_text: Working at Maybank was a memorable experience . Every day there are new things that await . With a team that always come together , every challenge can be overcome easily . Good guidance from management that constantly encourage the spirit of cooperation as a team makes every challenge becomes easy to overcome.

The workers were very friendly and helpful throughout my internship process. My supervisor pushed me to the very limit to do the given tasks and it was a very wonderful experience as it had given me a solid introduction working in a fast-paced business banking sector.
Very cooperative staff and great teamwork. Good culture create by manager to all staff. I have been working with friendly staff here.
duty as customer care officer managing daily operational work; staff & do sales convincing clients to sign up sales is tough feel good if clients are happy
cons_text: long hours been in one place

review_title: Very good and productive job culture
review_body_text: Every day was a challenging and exciting day at work since i'm in the sales position in the organisation. My previous position taught me about customer service, helping me enhancing my personal skills and everything about financial service. The co-workers were helpful. The hardest part of the job is when i need to convincing people to buy the banks product but although it is hard, i took it up as a challenge and it excites me everytime i managed to convince customers to buy the products. The most enjoyable part of the job is when i do felt i am helping these customers to reach their desirable financial goals through ways such as long-term investments and it is enjoyable when i get to assist the banks customers in every way that i can.

Maybank teach me a lot in managing my tasks, my time. The management is good in appreciating staff. My boss show me a good leadership in work. The hardest part of my previous job was handling money (as a Teller) while the enjoyable part of my previous job was being able to learn so many things regarding banking, office works, teamwork, integrity and relationship building.

do data entry and customer service have learned more about banking world management so far not so good but overall is ok non permanent staff more supportive than permanent staff here the hardest part when in UAT TEAM - have to go back late the most enjoyable part of the job is i'm doing what i love to do and have chance to do new things ; build engagement with customers,call customer for classroom training

review_title: Productive workplace aiming for the same goal
review_body_text: Many valuable and important knowledge were gained throughout my time with this company. All colleagues were very helpful and never hesitated to lend a hand in any kind of circumstances. Everyone in our department were aiming for the same goal, which is to earn desirable incentives. The salary offered was at satisfactory level.
job_title: Mortgage Consultant under mobile sales team

review_body_text: Learned a little bit about banking.Team leaders and team members very helpful. Hardest part when many customer comes in. Enjoyable part is when do a group briefing. Management really understanding about staff and good management.

Very systematic..work place.A lot of job we are doing and also helping our executive and manager and other team member. doing marketing.. and issued a lot of letter what are customer want. the enjoyable part are we are together work on team member and we are also get rewards.
fun and happy place. good salary with high commision. good staff and reliable management staff. well trained by maybank. i enjoy with maybank.
Maybank is daily routine work and good benefits nice location, friendly large products wise learn lots things responsible and efective

review_title: Excellent Benefits, high productivity with gym facility
review_body_text: My work is a constant around the clock prompt and requires me to contact with numerous party in adhering to the FRS 139 regulations. After working hours, when physically not tired, I would spend the time at the gym which is also equipped with a gym instructor. The environment is very encouraging in terms of support and learning Looking forward to see a an improvised FRS 139 in year 2018.

review_title: Working at Maybank is one of the best opportunity that employee can get while servicing in Maybank.
review_body_text: Check the submitted documents for any discrepancies, inconsistencies or any suspicious signs to minimize potential fraudulent applications. Ensure that sufficient information and documents are available for approvers to make informed judgments/decisions. Determine the correct approving authority for the applications Ensure accurate data capturing for information consistency and integrity in AA. Make sound credit recommendations that are reasonable, straightforward and balanced. Provide guidance / feedback / coaching to originators in respect of credit matters. Ensure compliance of internal policies and statutory regulations.

review_title: need to be learn technical skills immediately without training
review_body_text: average and full of adhoc task, always need to learn something new alone and no training provided. technical skills required, and lack of time manageable.
